query:

[tool: Bash(git push) → ]
[Assistant] Documentation trigger: `context_cycle_review` has a new `force` param and `context_status` gains `pending_cycle_reviews` — both user-visible MCP tool changes → MANDATORY. Spawning uni-docs and pushing in parallel.
[tool: Bash(git add product/features/crt-033/testing/ product/features/crt-033/reports/ product/features/crt-033/agents/crt-033-agen) → [feature/crt-033 fa964b7] test: crt-033 risk coverage + gate reports + integration tests (#453)

 create mode 100644 product/features/crt-033/reports/gate-3c-report.md
 create mode]
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_cycle(phase-end) → Acknowledged: phase_ended for topic 'crt-033'. Attribution is applied via the hook path (fire-and-forget). Use context_cycle_review to confirm session attribution.]
[Assistant] Gate 3c PASS. Proceeding to Phase 4.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
Eval Harness Baseline Recording Procedure (New Metrics)
ADR-003 nan-005: Documentation Step Trigger Criteria -- Mandatory for User-Visible Changes
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
